description: No upper bound on transfer amount allowed an unrealistic balance to be created, indicating missing range validation on the amount field.
recommendation: Enforce a maximum transfer amount and validate it against the sender's available balance before processing the transfer.

description: Negative transfer amounts are accepted, allowing the sender's balance to go negative and the receiver's to be credited without any real funds moving.
recommendation: Reject negative amounts at the request-validation layer and confirm the sender has sufficient balance before debiting.

description: Transfers succeed even when the receiver account does not appear to be validated as an existing user.
recommendation: Validate that the receiver exists before completing the transfer, and return a clear error otherwise.
